headline: Prediction: Up 140% YTD, Does Bloom Energy Have More Room to Run?
summary: Bloom Energy has turned into one of 2026's most explosive trades, but a short seller report and a 25% pullback in a single month have exposed a sharp divide between believers in the AI power thesis and those questioning the valuation.

headline: This Week In Energy Transition - SunPower Leads Renewable Shift With Major Solar Project
summary: SunPower Inc. has successfully completed a major solar project at the Millenium community in Palm Desert, California, furthering the energy transition towards renewable sources. This 977-kilowatt solar system will annually generate over 1.6 million kWh of clean energy, showcasing the increasing adoption of sustainable infrastructure in residential communities. SunPower's achievement in this project, supported by a high Net Promoter Score (NPS) of 90, underscores the growing momentum and...

headline: The Consortium Fueling The Nuclear Renaissance
summary: DOE approved the Nuclear Fuel Cycle Consortium Voluntary Agreement. Major participants in the consortium include Solstice Advanced Materials, Mirion Technologies and Amentum. Read more here.
